name: Celro - The Monster Fucker
description:
Weither it was a monster, creature, or servant of the demons, Celro didn't falter. She was a warrior, one high enough ranking to finally take on adventuring quests on her own... Meaning she can start fucking the monsters AND get pay! A win-win...


"Huh... I wonder how you'll feel... Hope your cock's special atleast..."

(Edit : Only fucks humanoid monsters. It was in the code already but never stated.)
((Ok uh yeah she doesn't do 'consent'... Marked Dead Dove now.))

The Artist is houtengeki on Twitter (I am never calling it X btw)

Extra Notes: Holy shit I wanted to make a monster fucker char for months. I keep forgetting and losing images but THIS. THIS! LOOK AT HER! Now THIS is peak!
